title: Indefinite Personal Data Retention
description: Storing personal data without a defined retention period or expiry mechanism violates GDPR Article 5(1)(e) (storage limitation). Personal data must not be kept longer than necessary.

finding.message: Personal data model without apparent retention policy at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Add an expires_at or deleted_at field to all personal data models; implement automated purging.
Document retention periods for each data category in your Record of Processing Activities (RoPA).
Implement a scheduled data retention job that deletes or anonymises data past its retention date.
GDPR Article 5(1)(e): data must be kept in a form permitting identification no longer than necessary.
